title: Potato-MC-Optimisation
description: optimisation for Potato PCs with a lot of mods {FABRIC}
body:
A Minecraft Mod made by me Lender :3. This mod trys to optimise minecraft so much that it runs on everything. Yes on your fridge too! 

What this mod adds (A small summary):
-Sodium + Sodium Extra
-NVIDIUM (please disable if not running nvidia gpu!)
-Indium
-FerritCore
-ModernFix
-Iris
-Lithium
-Dynamic FPS

Attention: If your are not using an nVIDIA GPU, please disable NVIDIUM.
Support me with Ethereum: 0x255625071b7ccd876e511b854325522ac973e633 or use my Minecraft Client: https://hacintosh-better-as-windows.github.io/FurryTailLauncherWebsite/
